national.label: National Emergency Number (ERSS) - Police, Fire & Rescue, Health
national.source_name: Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India
national.note: MHA's single pan-India emergency number: 'ONE INDIA ONE EMERGENCY NUMBER 112', a nationwide unified emergency response system. Works in every State/UT. Corroborated by india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 112 as the Integrated Helpline (ERSS) covering Police, Fire & Rescue and Health services.

national.label: Fire Helpline
national.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
national.note: Listed under 'Emergency Numbers' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

national.label: National Ambulance Service (NAS)
national.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
national.note: Listed as 'National Ambulance Service (NAS)' under Emergency Numbers on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

national.label: Women Helpline (national, toll-free)
national.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
national.note: Published as 'Women Helpline Toll free No. - 181' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed on india.gov.in as both 'Women Helpline Number' and 'Domestic Violence Helpline'.

national.label: National Commission for Women (NCW) 24x7 Helpline
national.note: NCW's own site states: 'Call the 24x7 NCW helpline at 14490 for immediate assistance and support', and lists 'NCW Women Helpline (14490)' under its Complaint Redressal cells. IMPORTANT: the india.gov.in helpline directory still lists 7827170170 as the 'National Commission for Women Helpline' - that number appears nowhere on ncw.gov.in (not even in raw HTML), so it appears stale and was deliberately omitted in favour of the department's own current number.

national.label: Child Helpline (national, toll-free)
national.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
national.note: Published as 'Child Helpline Toll free No. - 1098' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed as 'Child Help Line' on india.gov.in.

national.label: Elderline - National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)
national.source_name: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India
national.note: Published as 'Elder Helpline: 14567' on the Department of Social Justice & Empowerment's own Elderline site, which the ministry homepage links to as the 'National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)'. india.gov.in additionally lists a landline 011-20893999 alongside 14567 for the Senior Citizens Helpline.

national.label: National Consumer Helpline (NCH)
national.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
national.note: Listed as 'National Consumer Helpline (NCH)' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026). Note: the NCH portal consumerhelpline.gov.in could not be reached at time of research (DNS resolves to an NIC address but the host refused connections / returned 504), so only the number is cited here - not the NCH portal URL.

national.label: Cyber Crime Helpline (online financial fraud reporting)
national.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
national.note: Confirmed on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal homepage banner (MHA / Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre - I4C), which reads: 'To report online financial fraud, call 1930' and 'register your complaint at cybercrime.gov.in'. Independently corroborated by the india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 1930 as the Cyber Crime Helpline.

national.label: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal (file a cybercrime complaint)
national.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
national.note: Verified live. Ministry of Home Affairs portal for reporting cybercrime; supports anonymous reporting, women/children-related crime, financial fraud and other cybercrime, plus complaint tracking. Nationwide.

national.label: CPGRAMS - Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System
national.source_name: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions, Government of India
national.note: Verified live; this is the citizen-facing portal. The site states CPGRAMS is 'an online platform available to the citizens 24x7 to lodge their grievances to the public authorities on any subject related to service delivery... a single portal connected to all the Ministries/Departments of Government of India and States.' Supports tracking by registration ID and an appeal facility. Note: it does not cover RTI matters, subjudice/court matters, or religious matters.

national.label: Central Vigilance Commission - lodge a corruption complaint
national.source_name: Central Vigilance Commission (CVC), Government of India
national.note: Verified live. CVC's Complaint Management System with a 'Citizen Login', complaint status tracking and a published complaint handling policy. Linked from cvc.gov.in as 'Lodge a complaint'. Covers corruption complaints against central government organisations.

national.label: Relief Commissioner for Natural Calamities
national.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
national.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

national.label: Road Accident Helpline
national.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
national.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Electricity Department - Central Control Room (toll-free, no-light/power complaints)
channels.source_name: Electricity Department, Andaman & Nicobar Administration (official website)
channels.note: CAVEAT - verify before publishing prominently. The only official publication of this number I could read is a notice on the Electricity Department's own site describing it as "The toll-free number (18003451111) of the Central Control Room of the Electricity Department"; that notice (dated around April 2025) announced the line was temporarily under fault and gave 03192-235250 as an interim alternate, saying the issue would be resolved the next morning. No current standing "contact us" page on an official domain restates it (vidyut.andaman.gov.in and police-style contact pages were unreachable from here). The department's site otherwise routes "Consumer Complaint Redressal" to the UrjaPay portal (login required).

As a city-state Delhi appears not to publish such an index. This Revenue Department page is the closest official directory: it lists all districts (North, Central, South, New Delhi, South West, West, North East, East, North West, South East, Old Delhi, Central North, Outer North) with office addresses, phone numbers and emails, but does NOT hyperlink the individual district sites. Individual district sites do exist and follow the pattern dm<district>.delhi.gov.in (e.g. dmnorth.delhi.gov.in, dmnewdelhi.delhi.gov.in) or dccentral.delhi.gov.in - but no official page indexes them, so that pattern is NOT asserted here as a sourced claim. channels.label: Mipui Aw - Mizoram online public grievance portal (PGRAMS)

The portal explicitly warns: grievances sent by email are NOT entertained - they must be lodged on the website. Verified live with active counters (672 grievances registered, 611 closed at time of check). This is the answer to 'state online grievance portal'.
